hero.title: Uncompromising Engineering Solutions for OEM Manufacturers.
hero.subtitle: Design, customization and production of bearing assemblies for extreme loads.

slide0.title: We invest in metal. Not in marketing.
slide0.body: 100% of our financial assets are directed towards R&D, instrumental control and VELNOX product quality. The architecture of this website was entirely generated by artificial intelligence under our strict specification. Nothing superfluous. Pure efficiency only.

slide1.title: Cassette seals for agricultural machinery.
slide1.body: Maximum protection from abrasive dust and moisture. Multi-layer labyrinth sealing in the hub body preserves assembly life even under extreme field conditions.
slide1.spec: LEFG series — maintenance-free units for field conditions

slide2.title: Optimized geometry for extreme loads.
slide2.body: High-strength steel, precise geometry and engineered race surfaces — for withstanding radial and axial loads in construction and mining equipment.
slide2.spec: Load class: Cₙₙₙ up to 148 kN

slide3.title: Flange modification strictly to your specification.
slide3.body: From flange configuration to multi-stage cassette sealing — full R&D cycle: audit, CAD model, production, bench testing.
slide3.spec: Lead time: from 21 days with prototype

industries.title: Solutions Adapted to Industry Standards.
industries.desc: Every industry has its own critical failure factors. We design seals and select lubricants based on real conditions of your operating environment.

agro.title: Agro-Industrial Sector
agro.text: Protection from abrasive dust, moisture and impact loads. Maintenance-free assemblies with minimal downtime in field conditions.

construction.title: Construction & Special Equipment
construction.text: Resistance to extreme radial and axial loads. Assemblies designed for operation under heavy impact and vibration.

industrial.title: Industrial Equipment
industrial.text: High-speed solutions with minimal friction coefficient and efficient heat dissipation.

process.title: More Than a Catalogue. R&D for Your Specification.
process.desc: VELNOX doesn't just supply standard bearings. Our engineering team develops modified assemblies that solve the chronic problems of your machinery.

analyze.title: Specification Analysis & Assembly Audit
analyze.text: In-depth study of operating conditions, loads, environmental aggressiveness, and root cause of standard product failures.

design.title: Engineering Design & 3D Modelling
design.text: Development of the modified design: flange, sealing, materials. Full CAD model and service life calculation.

produce.title: Production & Bench Testing
produce.text: Series production with incoming steel inspection, bench testing and instrumental geometry measurement.

quality.title: Zero Tolerance for Defects.
quality.desc: We guarantee steel geometry and chemical composition stability in every batch. Strict incoming material control and multi-level testing.

cta.title: Find Your Solution Now.
cta.desc: Contact our engineers for analogue selection, service life calculation, or ordering a test batch.

hero.title: Official Distributor Network.
hero.desc: Only authorized suppliers with confirmed stock and engineering expertise. Guaranteed authenticity and supply stability of VELNOX products.

cta.title: Ready to join the VELNOX dealer network?
cta.desc: Partnership requires strict authorization criteria: warehouse facilities, qualified engineering support, and guaranteed order volumes.
cta.req3: Fulfillment of guaranteed minimum order volumes

form.title: Authorization Application
form.desc: Fill out the form. Our engineer will contact you within 24 hours.
form.name: Contact Person
form.message_ph: Briefly describe your company, region of work and why you are interested in partnership...
form.success_body: Our engineer will contact you within 24 hours to clarify the details.

hero.desc1: VELNOX is an engineering bearing brand built on years of hands-on market experience. The brand is owned by
hero.desc2: and is exclusively oriented toward machinery manufacturers, engineering design departments, and professional distributors.
hero.focus2: and the most critical machine assemblies.

philosophy.body1: The VELNOX philosophy excludes empty promises. All technical solutions are developed strictly for real operating conditions: specific loads, predictable service life, environmental aggressiveness, and the functional requirements of the specific assembly.
philosophy.body2: We do not suggest selecting parts purely by dimensions. Our work always starts with a deep analysis of the client's engineering specification — not by browsing a catalogue.

oem.intro: VELNOX understands the uncompromising logic of the OEM market. For series production, three factors are critical: steel quality stability, 100% repeatability of parameters, and engineering responsibility for the end result.

cards.metal_text: Continuous instrumental monitoring of chemical composition and mechanical properties of steel from batch to batch.
cards.tolerance_text: Strict adherence to geometric tolerances. Full interchangeability without additional fitting or adjustment.
cards.engineer_text: Every decision is backed by engineering reasoning. Not a catalogue — but the client's technical specification.
cards.resource_text: Products are designed for long-term operation in complex machinery — not for a cheap one-time field replacement.

custom.body1: The key advantage of VELNOX is the ability to adapt standard assemblies to a client's specific pain points. We modify structural elements, implement multi-stage sealing systems (Dirtblock seal + Forged cover plate), optimize materials, and calculate service life to within an hour of operation.
custom.body2: VELNOX is a rational engineering alternative to expensive European brands. You pay for working service life — not for a famous brand name markup.

cta.body: Engineering design departments, distributors of technical products, agricultural and industrial enterprises. Ready to integrate into your project.

product.cta_title: Ready for integration into your project?
product.cta_desc: Get exact CAD models of the units in the required format or contact our engineers for customization to your operating environment.

hero.title: VELNOX Bearing Units. Uncompromising Reliability for Serial Production.
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive engineering solutions designed for extreme radial and axial loads. From standard housing units to custom OEM projects.

block1.title: Why OEM Manufacturers Choose VELNOX Units?
block1.card1_desc: The #1 problem in the fields is abrasive and moisture. We implement multi-level sealing systems (T-Seal, Dirtblock Seal, Forged Cover Plate) that physically exclude dirt from entering the rolling body. Your unit runs its entire stated lifespan maintenance-free.
block1.card2_desc: For assembly line production, we guarantee the stability of geometric tolerances and cast iron/steel quality from batch to batch. No downtime due to defects.
block1.card3_desc: If a standard flange doesn't meet your drawing, our designers will modify the housing, change the lubrication system, or the seal type strictly according to your technical task.

block2.title: Technical Specifications & Unit Parameters
block2.intro: The VELNOX technical guide is created for fast work by designers and purchasers. Below are summary parameter tables for exact unit selection for your tasks.

table1.title: Table 1: Dimensional Specifications and Mountings
table1.desc: This table is critical for engineers integrating the unit into a 3D equipment model.
table1.col_width: Total Housing Width (A, A1, A2, mm)

table2.title: Table 2: Performance & Load Ratings
table2.desc: This table is required for calculating service life and safety margin.

table3.title: Table 3: VELNOX Sealing Systems
table3.desc: Here we visualize and explain the types of protection, as this is the main advantage for the agricultural sector.
table3.2rs: Basic contact seal for neutral conditions.
table3.2s: Single-lip seal with labyrinth. High protection from coarse particles.
table3.tseal: Triple-lip seal for maximum protection against dust and moisture.
table3.dirtblock: Extreme protection for heavy disc harrows. Semi-metal-semi-rubber with a forged cover plate.

table4.title: Table 4: Cross-References & Installations
table4.desc: Critical for distributors looking for a replacement to existing units.

block3.title: Ready for Integration into Your Project
block3.text: Download exact CAD models of units in the required format or contact our engineers to select a custom sealing system for your operating environment.
